fields.helpText: This file will hold the configuration parameters for the Clozapine reporting system.
This is the day of the week when the transmission should occur.  Normally this is set to TUESDAY, but may be changed to accommodate special circumstances.
This is the start date and time of the most recent transmission.
This is the date and time when the most recent transmission was completed.
This is the date and time when the most recent demographics transmission was completed.
This is the server address where the Clozapine order information and  patient blood test results get sent
This is the server address where the Clozapine Patient demographic  information get sent
This is the test server address or MailMan group where the Clozapine  order information and Patient blood test results get sent
This is the test server address or MailMan group where the Clozapine  Patient demographic information get sent
This is the default number of days to look back for retrieving lab  results when sending Clozapine-related HL7 messages to the National  Clozapine Registry.
If a Clozapine patient has not received a Clozapine prescription after  this number of days, they will be automatically discontinued.

This is the date and time that the Clozapine HL7 message transmission started.  This field will be updated by the options Clozapine HL7 Message Transmission [YSCL HL7 CLOZ TRANSMISSION] and Retransmit Clozapine HL7 Messages [YSCL HL7 CLOZ RETRANSMIT].

This is the date and time that the Clozapine HL7 message transmission finished.  This field will be updated by the options Clozapine HL7 Message Transmission [YSCL HL7 CLOZ TRANSMISSION] and Retransmit Clozapine HL7 Messages [YSCL HL7 CLOZ RETRANSMIT].
